title: Crystal Cave (Dantooine)

The '''Crystal Cave''' was located on the southeast end of the [[Khoonda plains]] in the Sandral fields on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]. A [[Jedi Enclave]] was present nearby, giving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] access to the world's wealth of precious [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|lightsaber crystals]], which were vital to the construction of the Order's [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]].

==Description==
The Crystal Cave on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] had been burrowed by its [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] inhabitants, the [[Kinrath/Legends|kinrath]], a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Poison/Legends|poisonous]] [[Spider/Legends|arachnoids]]. The original entrance to the cave was located at the East end of a territory called "the Sandral Grounds," which was named after the [[Sandral family|family]] of [[Human/Legends|Human]] colonists that had established their [[Sandral estate|estate]] in the area.<ref name="KOTOR" /> At some point after [[3956 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' says that the events of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' happened in [[3956 BBY]].</ref> the entrance was sealed, but the kinrath slowly dug a new tunnel that led to the [[Khoonda plains]],<ref name="KOTORII">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref> an area that had once hosted the [[Matale estate|compound]] of the [[Matale family]]. In its first incarnation, the Crystal Cave consisted of a large tunnel ending on a single chamber.<ref name="KOTOR" /> Following the carving of a new, bigger cave by the kinrath, it contained two chambers and more complex network of tunnels.<ref name="KOTORII" />

Among the naturally occurring crystal structures were [[Adegan crystal/Legends|Adegan crystals]],<ref name="KOTORII" /> once believed to only grow on [[Adega]],<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> which produced [[Color/Legends|blue]], green and yellow variations. A mystery for the Jedi, red crystals would sometimes form in unhatched kinrath eggs; [[rubat]] and [[bondar]] crystals were also occasionally seen with the cave system.<ref name="KOTOR" /> In [[3951 BBY]],<ref name="NEC2">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' says that the events of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' happened in [[3951 BBY]].</ref> at least one [[Ultima-Pearl]], a type of gem normally only found on the oceanic floor of the planet [[Dac/Legends|Dac]], was present in the cave.<ref name="KOTORII" />

==History==
[[File:Dantooine_conclave.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The nearby [[Jedi Enclave]].]]

During the [[Jedi Civil War]], a conflict between the Republic and the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] of [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] and [[Darth Malak]], the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] had a [[Jedi Enclave]] near the mouth of the cave, giving them access to [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|lightsaber crystals]], which were vital to the construction of [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]]. For Jedi trained in the enclave, traversing the caves was a rite of passage similar to<ref name="KOTOR" /> that experienced in the [[Crystal Cave/Legends|Crystal Cave]] on the planet [[Ilum/Legends|Ilum]].<ref name="TheGathering">{{TCW|The Gathering (episode)}}</ref> The kinrath burrowed the cave and used it as a nesting site. They would attack anything that they perceived as a threat to their nests.<ref name="KOTOR" />

Following Revan's retraining as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] and forced amnesia, he entered the cave and collected numerous crystals to enhance his lightsaber during his quest to find the mysterious and deadly [[Star Forge]].<ref name="KOTOR" /> During the [[Dark Wars]] that followed the death of Malak and the destruction of the Star Forge, the Jedi Enclave was devastated and closed. When the city of [[Khoonda]] was formed, the Dantooine militia sealed the kinrath caves, closing off access to the precious crystals. Despite this, the kinrath quickly made a new tunnel to the surface that was even closer to the city and attacks by the vicious creatures increased.<ref name="KOTORII" />

During this dark period for the Jedi Order, the exiled Jedi [[Meetra Surik]] entered the cave complex<ref name="KOTORII" /> in 3951 BBY<ref name="NEC2" /> and killed the [[Kinrath/Legends|kinrath matriarch]] in order to pacify the local kinrath population. While exploring the tunnels, she and her companions stumbled across the Crystal Cave, and with the help of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kreia]], she was able to detect the imprint that Revan had left upon the chamber. While she was there, Surik collected several lightsaber crystals, including a unique [[Meetra Surik Crystal|personal crystal]] which would prove quite useful during her campaign against the [[Sith Triumvirate]].<ref name="KOTORII" />

[[File:CrystalCaveSkirmish-US.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Republic and Jedi forces confront [[Darth Angral]] and [[Darth Baras]] in the Caves during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]].]]

Over three hundred years following Revan's visit a group of Jedi, including [[Satele Shan]], [[Fortris Gall]] and Master [[Dar'Nala]] entered the cave to meet with representatives of the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|resurgent Sith Empire]] in the weeks following the shocking [[Treaty of Coruscant]]. When [[Darth Baras]] and [[Darth Angral]] arrived to negotiate, Jedi Shan attacked and refused to negotiate with Sith. During the [[Skirmish in the Ancient Crystal Cave|skirmish]], Shan realized that Master Dar'Nala had succumbed to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] in her attempts to destroy the Sith. Before Shan could intercede and help her former master, the Togruta was killed by the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Dalborra]]. Fleeing the caves, the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] between the Sith and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] would continue on for years after.<ref name="The Old Republic, Threat of Peace Act 3: Uncertain Surrender">''[[The Old Republic, Threat of Peace Act 3: Uncertain Surrender]]''</ref>

By the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] some two millennia after the Cold War, the Order had reestablished some ties with Dantooine, and saw some visits to the Dantooine Caves. [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Jax Pavan]] was one Jedi apprentice who traveled from the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] during the conflict to obtain a rare Dantooinian crystal for use in his lightsaber.<ref name="CNI">''[[Coruscant Nights I: Jedi Twilight]]''</ref>
